headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Edison International, Raises Price Target to $74
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Aidan Kelly   maintains Edison International (NYSE:EIX) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $66 to $74.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Edison International, Raises Price Target to $74
raw.summary: JP Morgan  analyst Aidan Kelly   maintains Edison International (NYSE:EIX) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $66 to $74.

headline: Edison executive pay soars despite devastating Eaton fire
summary: Edison International boosted the pay of its top executives last year despite their responsibility for the safety of the company's electricity lines before the deadly Eaton fire, which destroyed a wide swath of Altadena and killed 19 people
